questions.prompt: Какое предложение правильно использует Future Perfect с маркером 'by next week'?

choices.text: By next week, I will finish the project.
By next week, I will have finished the project.
By next week, I will be finishing the project.
By next week, I finish the project.

questions.explanation: Маркер 'by next week' требует Future Perfect, поэтому правильный ответ — 'will have finished'.

questions.prompt: Какое предложение правильно использует Future Continuous с маркером 'at 5 PM'?

choices.text: At 5 PM, I will be working.
At 5 PM, I will work.
At 5 PM, I will have worked.
At 5 PM, I work.

questions.explanation: Маркер 'at 5 PM' указывает на конкретный момент, поэтому используется Future Continuous.

questions.prompt: Какое предложение правильно использует Future Perfect с маркером 'by 2028'?

choices.text: By 2028, the city will have built a new airport.
By 2028, the city will build a new airport.
By 2028, the city will be building a new airport.
By 2028, the city builds a new airport.

questions.explanation: Маркер 'by 2028' требует Future Perfect, поэтому правильный ответ — 'will have built'.

questions.prompt: Какое предложение правильно использует Future Continuous с маркером 'at this time next month'?

choices.text: At this time next month, we will be traveling.
At this time next month, we will travel.
At this time next month, we will have traveled.
At this time next month, we travel.

questions.explanation: Маркер 'at this time next month' указывает на конкретный момент, поэтому используется Future Continuous.

questions.prompt: Какое предложение правильно использует Future Perfect с маркером 'by the time we finish'?

choices.text: By the time we finish, the project will have been completed.
By the time we finish, the project will be completed.
By the time we finish, the project will complete.

questions.explanation: Маркер 'by the time' требует Future Perfect, поэтому правильный ответ — 'will have been completed'.

questions.prompt: Какое предложение правильно использует Future Continuous с маркером 'at 10 AM'?

choices.text: At 10 AM, the train will be arriving.
At 10 AM, the train will arrive.
At 10 AM, the train will have arrived.
At 10 AM, the train arrives.

questions.explanation: Маркер 'at 10 AM' указывает на конкретный момент, поэтому используется Future Continuous.

questions.prompt: Какое предложение правильно использует Future Perfect с маркером 'by the end of the month'?

choices.text: By the end of the month, we will have submitted all reports.
By the end of the month, we will submit all reports.
By the end of the month, we will be submitting all reports.
By the end of the month, we submit all reports.

questions.explanation: Маркер 'by the end of the month' требует Future Perfect, поэтому правильный ответ — 'will have submitted'.

questions.prompt: Какое предложение правильно использует Future Continuous с маркером 'at 7 PM tomorrow'?

choices.text: At 7 PM tomorrow, they will be watching the game.
At 7 PM tomorrow, they will watch the game.
At 7 PM tomorrow, they will have watched the game.
At 7 PM tomorrow, they watch the game.

questions.explanation: Маркер 'at 7 PM tomorrow' указывает на конкретный момент, поэтому используется Future Continuous.

questions.prompt: Какое предложение правильно использует Future Perfect с маркером 'by next year'?

choices.text: By next year, the new policy will have been implemented.
By next year, the new policy will be implemented.
By next year, the new policy will implement.
By next year, the new policy implements.

questions.explanation: Маркер 'by next year' требует Future Perfect, поэтому правильный ответ — 'will have been implemented'.

questions.prompt: Какое предложение правильно использует Future Continuous с маркером 'at 3 PM'?

choices.text: At 3 PM, the meeting will be starting.
At 3 PM, the meeting will start.
At 3 PM, the meeting will have started.
At 3 PM, the meeting starts.

questions.explanation: Маркер 'at 3 PM' указывает на конкретный момент, поэтому используется Future Continuous.
